ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pharmaceuticals" (
  "pharm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmaceutical category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Name of the pharmaceutical category (e.g., N06A-Antidepressants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pharmaceutical category */,
  "atc_code" TEXT /* ATC code for the pharmaceutical category */,
  "atc_description" TEXT /* Description of the ATC code */,
  "who_rec_list" INTEGER /* Whether the pharmaceutical is on the WHO recommended list */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the pharmaceutical class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pharm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the country (e.g., AUS for Australia) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., Asia, Europe, etc.) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country (e.g., high, middle, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare measure (e.g., Defined daily dosage per 1 000 inhabitants per day) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the healthcare measure */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of measure (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the healthcare measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement (e.g., NBPYEANB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., count, ratio, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "pharm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmaceutical category */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare measure */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "flag_codes" TEXT /* Flag codes for the data point (e.g., D for difference in methodology) */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Description of the flags */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_pharm_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharm_id") REFERENCES pharmaceuticals ("pharm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_value" REAL /* Value of the data point in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
